title: Understanding Flexbox and Grid
content:
Flexbox and Grid are the backbone of modern layout on the web. Flexbox is great for one-dimensional layouts (rows or columns), while Grid shines for two-dimensional layouts.

In my projects, I used Flexbox for navbars, cards, and simple layouts, and Grid for dashboards, galleries, and complex page structures.

The key is to practice by building real components, not just reading docs.
